name: Claude Code
description: وكيل برمجة AI من Anthropic — يعمل مباشرة في الترمينال لكتابة وتعديل الكود
official_description: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding tool that operates directly in your terminal, understanding your codebase and executing commands.
description_en: Anthropic's agentic coding tool — works directly in your terminal to write and edit code

name: Cursor
description: محرر كود AI الأشهر — مبني على VS Code مع ذكاء اصطناعي مدمج في كل مكان
official_description: Cursor is the AI-first code editor built on VS Code, featuring AI-powered code completion, chat, and multi-file editing.
description_en: The most popular AI code editor — built on VS Code with AI everywhere

name: Replit Agent
description: وكيل AI من Replit يبني تطبيقات كاملة من الصفر — يُنشئ ويشغّل وينشر
official_description: Replit Agent builds complete applications from natural language, handling environment setup, coding, debugging, and deployment.
description_en: Replit's AI agent builds full apps from scratch — creates, runs & deploys

name: Perplexity AI
description: محرك بحث AI الأذكى — يجيب بمصادر موثقة ويبحث في الإنترنت لحظياً
official_description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered search engine that provides cited, accurate answers by searching the web in real-time.
description_en: Smartest AI search engine — answers with cited sources and real-time web search

name: NotebookLM
description: أداة بحث AI من Google — حوّل مستنداتك لبودكاست صوتي أو ملخصات ذكية
official_description: NotebookLM by Google is an AI research assistant that analyzes your documents and generates audio overviews, summaries, and Q&A.
description_en: Google's AI research tool — turn documents into podcasts or smart summaries

name: Pika
description: أداة AI لتوليد وتحرير الفيديوهات — مؤثرات سينمائية وتحويل الصور لفيديو
official_description: Pika is an AI video creation platform that generates and edits videos with cinematic effects, lip sync, and image-to-video capabilities.
description_en: AI video creation tool — cinematic effects and image-to-video conversion

name: FLUX
description: نموذج توليد صور مفتوح المصدر من Black Forest Labs — جودة تنافس Midjourney
official_description: FLUX by Black Forest Labs is an open-source image generation model that rivals Midjourney in quality with fast generation times.
description_en: Open-source image model from Black Forest Labs — rivals Midjourney quality

name: Napkin AI
description: أداة AI لتحويل النصوص لرسوم بيانية وإنفوجرافيك احترافي بضغطة زر
official_description: Napkin AI transforms text into professional diagrams, infographics, and visual content automatically.
description_en: AI tool to convert text into professional diagrams and infographics instantly

name: Otter.ai
description: أداة AI لتدوين ملاحظات الاجتماعات تلقائياً — نسخ صوتي فوري وملخصات ذكية
official_description: Otter.ai provides AI-powered meeting notes with real-time transcription, automated summaries, and action item extraction.
description_en: AI meeting note-taker — real-time transcription and smart summaries

name: Dify
description: منصة مفتوحة المصدر لبناء تطبيقات AI — واجهة سحب وإفلات لتطوير وكلاء وتطبيقات
official_description: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform with visual workflow builder, RAG, agent capabilities, and model management.
description_en: Open-source platform to build AI apps — drag-and-drop workflow for agents and apps

name: n8n
description: منصة أتمتة مفتوحة المصدر مع AI — بديل Zapier مجاني للمطورين
official_description: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform with 400+ integrations and AI capabilities for building complex automation.
description_en: Open-source automation platform with AI — free Zapier alternative for developers

name: Julius AI
description: أداة AI لتحليل البيانات والإحصائيات — ارفع ملفاتك واحصل على رسوم بيانية وتحليلات
official_description: Julius AI is a data analysis tool that lets you analyze data, create visualizations, and get insights using natural language.
description_en: AI data analysis tool — upload files and get charts, stats & insights

name: Shopify Sidekick
description: مساعد AI لمتاجر Shopify — يدير المنتجات والتسويق والتحليلات بالمحادثة
official_description: Shopify Sidekick is an AI commerce assistant that helps store owners manage products, marketing, analytics, and store operations.
description_en: AI assistant for Shopify stores — manages products, marketing & analytics via chat

name: Synthesia
description: منصة إنشاء فيديوهات AI بأفاتارات واقعية — للتدريب والتسويق بـ140+ لغة
official_description: Synthesia is an AI video generation platform with realistic avatars for creating training, marketing, and corporate videos in 140+ languages.
description_en: AI video platform with realistic avatars — training & marketing in 140+ languages

name: Arcads
description: أداة AI لإنشاء إعلانات UGC بأفاتارات واقعية — حوّل النص لإعلان فيديو احترافي
official_description: Arcads creates AI-generated UGC-style video ads with realistic AI actors from text scripts for marketing campaigns.
description_en: AI tool for UGC video ads with realistic avatars — text to professional video ad
